name: Honey-Mint Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and honey in a saucepan and bring to boil over high heat.
2. Remove from heat. Add mint and let cool.
3. Pour liquid through a strainer into a pitcher and discard mint leaves.
4. Add lemon juice. Taste and add sugar to desired sweetness.
5. Chill. To serve, fill glasses with ice and pour in lemonade.
Makes 1 Quart
